overview: Static HTML/CSS/JavaScript recreation of the Portal and Portal 2 end-credit sequences. Each page loads local data arrays, a local controller script, and local audio to type lyrics and credits into fixed monospace layouts without a build system.
graph:
portal/index.html -> portal/style.css, portal/cakedata.js, portal/cake.js, portal/Still Alive.ogg
portal/cake.js -> global asciiart, credits, lyrics from portal/cakedata.js
portal/cake.js -> ../launcher/?random=1 (audio.ended under ?autoloop=1&random=1)
portal2/index.html -> portal2/style.css, portal2/cakedata.js, portal2/cake.js, portal2/Want You Gone.mp3
portal2/index.html -> cake.setVolume via inline #volume handlers
portal2/cake.js -> global credits, lyrics from portal2/cakedata.js
portal2/cake.js -> ../launcher/?random=1 (audio.ended under ?autoloop=1&random=1)
portal2/portal1style/index.html -> portal2/portal1style/style.css, cakedata.js, cake.js, Want You Gone.mp3
portal2/portal1style/cake.js -> global credits, lyrics from portal2/portal1style/cakedata.js
portal2/portal1style/cake.js -> ../../launcher/?random=1 (audio.ended under ?autoloop=1&random=1)
launcher/index.html -> launcher/launcher.css, launcher/launcher.js
launcher/launcher.js -> ../portal/?autoloop=1, ../portal2/?autoloop=1, ../portal2/portal1style/?autoloop=1 (click/hotkey) or +&random=1 variants (random pick)
